label: 相等判断
description: 判断「条件」是否等于「规则」：两边都转成字符串后比较，相等输出 true，否则输出 false。支持数字/字符串等任意输入（按字符串比较），支持 DataTree 批处理（多 branch 时按 lacing 逐对比较）。
description-en: Test whether 'condition' equals 'rule': both sides are coerced to strings and compared; outputs true when equal, false otherwise. Accepts any input (compared as strings) and supports DataTree batching (per-branch pairing via lacing).
icon: 一个等号 = 居中，左右各一个输入，结果为对勾/叉，扁平几何风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: condition
inputs.label: 条件
inputs.description: 待判断的条件值；与「规则」按字符串比较。
inputs.description-en: The condition value to test; compared against 'rule' as a string.

inputs.name: rule
inputs.label: 规则
inputs.description: 用于比对的规则值；与「条件」按字符串比较。
inputs.description-en: The rule value to match; compared against 'condition' as a string.

outputs.name: result
outputs.label: 结果
outputs.description: 条件等于规则时为 true，否则为 false。
outputs.description-en: true when condition equals rule, false otherwise.
